examples: He had an unquenchable thirst for life.
Dust dries your throat, leaving an unquenchable thirst.
Meanwhile, demand for oil in China and India has become unquenchable.
At least not as long as Americans provide their service with our unquenchable thirst.
Richard brandishes a piercing and methodical intelligence, Johnny a swashbuckling attack mode and an unquenchable savoir faire.
